title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent workflows: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise reasoning, multi-agent validation for response checking, symbolic guardians using Python rules, and runtime guardrails for agent self-correction. The approaches are demonstrated on a travel agent and integrated into Amazon Bedrock AgentCore for production scale.
